title: Insiderhärvan kring Mårder växer – fler misstänkta
summary_md:
# Insiderhärvan kring Mårder växer – fler misstänkta

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-06  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode covers the expanding insider-trading investigation around well-known savings profile Günther Mårder and trading in the stock 'Research'. Prosecutors say additional suspects are now being probed for insider crimes tied to the same stock, while the hosts note the share has actually held up (+2-3% on the day) despite the scandal, with its recent weakness attributed to a soft interim report (weak order intake) rather than the legal cloud. A charging decision is expected late summer or autumn.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
